synced:
[00:06.37] For a while there, it was rough
[00:09.46] But lately, I've been doin' better
[00:13.15] Than the last four cold Decembers
[00:16.54] I recall
[00:19.95] And I see my family every month
[00:23.24] I found a girl my parents love
[00:26.80] She'll come and stay the night
[00:28.66] And I think I might have it all
[00:33.97] And I thank God every day
[00:37.11] For the girl He sent my way
[00:40.68] But I know the things He gives me
[00:43.45] He can take away
[00:47.61] And I hold you every night
[00:50.23] And that's a feeling I wanna get used to
[00:55.41] But there's no man as terrified
[00:59.37] As the man who stands to lose you
[01:07.50] Oh, I hope I don't lose you
[01:11.19] Mm
[01:13.19] Please stay
[01:16.92] I want you, I need you, oh God
[01:19.83] Don't take
[01:23.48] These beautiful things that I've got

[01:30.64] I want you, I need you, oh God
[01:33.70] Don't take

[02:01.59] Why do I sit and wait 'til it's gone?
[02:05.77] Oh, I'll tell ya, I know I've got enough
[02:09.65] I've got peace and I've got love
[02:13.15] But I'm up at night thinkin'

[02:19.02]
